summary: Iteration 18 full-stack verification (Representatives CRM upgrade + removeChild fix). Backend: 5/5 pytest passed. Frontend: rep creation completes cleanly (dialog closes, table refreshes, new row appears, ZERO removeChild/pageerror events), CRM profile renders 8-field identity, 4 KPI cards, all 4 tabs, all 8 history-filter chips, Edit/Suspend/Reset password inline actions work. All admin & rep routes stable — no ErrorBoundary triggered anywhere.

ui_bugs.issue: Displays '-84378s ago' for Victor — relTime() helper produces negative deltas when last_activity_at is in the future relative to browser clock (or has TZ mismatch). Cosmetic only; suggest guarding with `if (secs < 0) return 'just now'` or clamp to zero.

test_results.backend_pytest: 5/5 PASS — list_reps enrichment (Victor: active=8 pending=9 approved=12), create_rep with phone/website/territory persists + no password_hash, profile.notifications array + timeline.actor_name/actor_role, PATCH phone update, /api/auth/login updates last_login_at within 1min
test_results.frontend_rep_creation: PASS — dialog closes, new row (test-marco-*@test.example) appears, 0 removeChild errors, 0 pageerrors, 0 console errors, no ErrorBoundary
test_results.frontend_rep_list_columns: PASS — headers: [Agency, Representative, Country, Active, Pending, Approved, Last activity, Status]; Victor row shows 8 / 9 / 12
test_results.frontend_crm_profile: PASS — rep-identity(8 fields), rep-kpis(4 cards), crm-tabs(4 tabs: history/campaigns/notifications/timeline) all render; tab switching does not crash
test_results.frontend_history_filters: PASS — all 8 chips (all/banner/sponsorship/approved/pending_review/revision_requested/rejected/archived) present and clickable
test_results.frontend_edit_dialog: PASS — edit-rep-dialog opens with prefilled data, edit-rep-submit closes dialog cleanly, no removeChild
test_results.frontend_sidebar_labels: PASS — 'Commerce' brand and 'Project Proposals' menu label present

action_items: (LOW) Fix relTime() in Representatives.jsx line ~187 to guard against negative secs — display 'just now' or clamp to 0 for future-dated timestamps.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix for removeChild race confirmed effective: native <select> + setTimeout(0) before load() works — 0 removeChild events across create + edit flows.
RepresentativeProfile.jsx (309 lines) is close to limit; consider extracting EditRepDialog and Tabs into subcomponents if it grows further.
representatives.py list_reps performs N+1 aggregation (one _stats call per rep). Fine for <500 reps but consider single aggregation pipeline for scale.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all targeted flows pass; 1 cosmetic negative-relative-time bug reported)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@independentmedia.hub / Admin2026! ; Rep: victor.laurent@parismedia.fr / Rep2026!
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed rep in backend test; UI test created 'test-marco-<ts>@test.example' rep (still present, not cleaned up — main agent can delete via DELETE /api/admin/representatives/{id}).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 fully verified: removeChild bug eliminated, CRM profile complete with 4 tabs + inline admin actions, list columns enriched with active/pending/approved/last_activity. Only outstanding cosmetic issue: relTime() shows negative seconds when last_activity_at > client clock. All backend enrichment endpoints stable.
rca of the issue: Original removeChild root cause = Radix Select portal being unmounted mid-transition when parent re-rendered the reps table synchronously on success. Fix: (1) native <select> for country (no portal), (2) setOpen(false) → setTimeout(0) → load() so Radix Dialog unmount completes before setReps() replaces the tree. Verified: 0 removeChild events across rep create AND edit dialog flows.
